inline_comments.message: We access AAI through MSB, I think this don't need to change.

This is unfortunately not true: I have tried it with Beijing master

 grep -r SDC_BASE_URL *
catalog/pub/config/config.py:SDC_BASE_URL = "https://10.0.3.1:8443"
catalog/pub/msapi/sdc.py:from catalog.pub.config.config import SDC_BASE_URL, SDC_USER, SDC_PASSWD
catalog/pub/msapi/sdc.py:    return restcall.call_req(base_url=SDC_BASE_URL,
catalog/pub/msapi/sdc.py:    ret = restcall.call_req(base_url=SDC_BASE_URL,
docker/instance_config.sh:if [ $SDC_BASE_URL ]; then
docker/instance_config.sh:    sed -i "s|SDC_BASE_URL.*|SDC_BASE_URL = '$SDC_BASE_URL'|" vfc/nfvo/catalog/catalog/pub/config/config.py
Nemets-MacBook-Pro:catalog dnemeth$
